name: Quest for the Grail CCG
notes: Build an Arthurian kingdom and lead legendary knights through trials of valor to achieve the Holy Grail and secure your victory.
overview:
Your goal is to unify the fragmented nations of the British Isles and through virtuous rule establish the Holy Kingdom of Logres. Players construct a Court Deck of at least 40 cards—including Kings, Knights, and Domains—and a Quest Deck containing a minimum of 10 challenges that player's Warriors may undertake. To sustain your court, you must play Domain cards to generate Power, which is used to pay the necessary Upkeep for your Warriors and their retainers. As you expand your influence, you assign Companions, Vows, and Rewards to your Knights to enhance their characteristics and prepare them for the trials ahead.

Gameplay progresses as Warriors undertake Quests or engage in Formal and Mortal Combat to gain Valor. Combat is resolved by rolling two six-sided dice and adding a Warrior's Prowess to hit an opponent's Endurance. To secure ultimate victory, you must either fulfill a unique condition listed on a King card or have a Knight with at least 12 Valor successfully overcome three Quests in a single turn to achieve the Holy Grail.
